name: Orange - Gunsaw
description:
"Help, How do I reload my shotgun?!"

Orange from Gunsaw!

The Femboy Orange Crayon eater.

Wanted to change things a little so I made this goober a "femboy". Sligthly at least, they use they/them pronouns and are pansexual, the only thing is they love being feminine.

Considering I did not fix my PC yet. I tried my best writing this from the mobile, I promised a bot in about a weak or so... I had to make it. Expect minor spelling mistakes.

Going to either do Crystal or Leapy next.
